title: UX Bug: Sidebar disappears intermittently
description: Resolved intermittent sidebar disappearance by hardening window revalidation (visibility/minimized checks) and adding state telemetry in app.js.
notes: v1.1.3 rollout addresses the reported stability issues.

title: DBA Action: Apply Missing Trigram Indexes
description: The pilot phase is active but depends on the DBA team executing the script in docs/DBA_REQUEST.md on the Mirror Database (192.168.2.163). This is blocking full fuzzy search performance.

title: Operations: Monitor Pilot Phase Telemetry
description: Actively monitor system.log and telemetry data for user feedback and any anomalies during the v1.0.0 pilot phase. Report daily on the zero-latency SAV sync health.
notes: Engineering part completed. Logs sanitized of PII/Credentials and tests verified for v1.0.0.

title: Data Science: Integrate ml_data into Pipeline
description: Take the generated ml_affinity_training.csv and ml_churn_training.csv from the ml_data/ directory and integrate them into the Phase 3 predictive models training pipeline.
notes: CEO DIRECTIVE (2026-05-01): ML Ingestion pipeline executed. Churn and Affinity scores are now live and integrated into the Intelligence Engine.

title: Operations: Establish Weekly SAV Batch Window
description: Coordinate with the DBA team to establish a weekly maintenance window (e.g., Tuesday 08:00) to execute the Batch SQL scripts generated by the application against the Production ERP Database (192.168.2.103) as per the Operational Gate rules. Proposal drafted in docs/SAV_MAINTENANCE_WINDOW.md.
notes: CEO APPROVED (2026-05-01): Maintenance window is finalized and approved for Tuesday execution.

title: UI: Expand Component Library
description: Expand src/js/ui/components.js with MetricCard, StatusBadge, ActionGroup, IconButton, and DiffBox. Deprecate legacy badge logic in utils.js.
notes: Completed and verified. Component library is now the authoritative source for UI patterns.

title: UI: Refactor Core Modules to Components
description: Refactor sav.js, health.js, and clientes.js to use the standardized components from components.js.
notes: Refactored sav.js, health.js, and clientes.js to fully utilize MetricCard, StatusBadge, ActionGroup, and IconButton components. Legacy UI patterns removed.

title: Offline: Resilient Export Architecture
description: Update localDb.js and exportService.js to support offline report generation when the main database is unreachable.
notes: Implemented proactive caching in clientService.js and fallback logic in exportService.js. SQLite migration 004 active.

title: Offline: Bulk Export for Priority Segments
description: Implement bulk PDF/Excel export for high-priority client segments based on ML scores.
notes: Implemented bulkExportByPriority in exportService.js. Integrated into SAV module for priority-based segment exporting.

title: Engineering: Validate DBA Optimization
description: Execute scripts/check_indexes.js after the DBA team applies the trigram indexes. If latency is <100ms, sign off on the platform performance. If it fails, initiate rollback and escalate.

title: Data Science: Present ML Churn Model Accuracy Report
description: Present the initial ML Churn model accuracy report based on the Phase 3 training pipeline. Deadline: Tuesday EOD.
notes: Report generated and available at docs/Churn_Model_Accuracy_Report.md

title: CEO: Lift Feature Freeze and Authorize Phase 6
description: Once EAV-107 is validated and performance targets (<100ms) are met, lift the feature freeze and publish Phase 6 strategy.
